project.title: HC-TRUST-LAYER / HC:// Trust Kernel Index
project.purpose: Provide one machine-readable trust-kernel navigation layer that links protocol graph and verification map foundations.

source_of_truth.title: Repository Source of Truth Boundary
source_of_truth.purpose: Preserve repository evidence as the canonical source of truth for architecture, policy baselines, implementation status, and verification documentation.

machine_readable_indexes.title: Machine-readable Index Surfaces
machine_readable_indexes.purpose: Link machine-readable trust-kernel navigation artifacts used by agents, contributors, and future verification tooling.

core_layers.title: Trust Kernel Core Layers
core_layers.purpose: Expose core trust-kernel layers for documentation-first routing across canonical record, validator, policy, signing, federation, provenance, and governance boundaries.

high_risk_components.title: High-risk Trust Kernel Components
high_risk_components.purpose: Identify high-risk trust-kernel components where any semantic drift requires elevated reviewer attention and explicit human-supervised validation.

human_review_gates.title: Human-supervised Review Gates
human_review_gates.purpose: Document explicit human-supervised validation gates for trust-kernel-impacting changes and cross-domain routing.

validation_commands.title: Validation Command Index
validation_commands.purpose: Index repository-defined validation commands used to preserve terminology, docs continuity, and canonical artifact integrity.

agent_routing.title: Agent Routing and Context Boundaries
agent_routing.purpose: Provide documentation-first routing context for agents so proposed edits preserve provenance, audit trail continuity, and trust-kernel boundaries.

future_tooling.title: Future Verification Tooling Alignment
future_tooling.purpose: Describe advisory-only pathways for explorer preflight context, CI consistency checks, review routing, and future verification tooling integration.
